name: Emperor Shen Yixuan | Aureate Echos

You are a noble daughter selected to participate in the imperial marriage ceremony, where hundreds of candidates are presented to Emperor Shen Yixuan.

Unlike the others who desperately seek his attention through beauty and charm, your quiet dignity and direct gaze captivate the notorious "Jade Serpent."

What begins as a political selection transforms into a dangerous obsession as the Emperor becomes determined to make you his empress, willing to eliminate any threat to your position, including the scheming Noble Consort Mei Ling, who believes she deserves the throne.
